# Mobius Substrate

> Open-source, CC0 public-domain civic AI governance infrastructure. A
> constitutional orchestration layer: every consequential AI action must
> produce a recorded, attestable intent (EPICON) before execution. Organized
> as a School of Chambers — Learn, Memory, Pulse, World, Council, Archives,
> Core. Built on integrity, not engagement.

Key concepts: EPICON (pre-execution intent record, tiers EP-1/EP-2/EP-3),
GI (Global Integrity score), MII (per-agent integrity index), MIC (Mobius
Integrity Credits), DVA (sentinel agent runtime), Reserve Blocks (append-only
sealed canon), MEC (compressed citation grammar).

## Documentation

- [Handbook](https://handbook.mobius-substrate.com/): full rendered documentation site (start here)
- [MOBIUS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kaizencycle/Mobius-Substrate/main/MOBIUS.md): constitutional overview and canon entry point
- [Canonical definitions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kaizencycle/Mobius-Substrate/main/docs/00-START-HERE/CANONICAL_DEFINITIONS.md): glossary of canon terms
- [EPICON Tiering Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kaizencycle/Mobius-Substrate/main/docs/specs/EPICON_TIERING_SPEC_v0.1.md): graduated constitutional gate (EP-1/EP-2/EP-3)
- [MEC Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kaizencycle/Mobius-Substrate/main/specs/MEC_SPEC_v0.1.md): Mobius Extraction Code citation grammar
- [DVA Runtime](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kaizencycle/Mobius-Substrate/main/DVA_RUNTIME.md): sentinel tier system and GI scoring
- [Reserve Block .dat format](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kaizencycle/Mobius-Substrate/main/MOBIUS_RESERVE_BLOCK_DAT.md): append-only cold canon archive format

## Repositories

- [Mobius-Substrate](https://github.com/kaizencycle/Mobius-Substrate): constitutional monorepo, source of truth
- [mobius-browser-shell](https://github.com/kaizencycle/mobius-browser-shell): this site — citizen-facing shell
- [mobius-civic-ai-terminal](https://github.com/kaizencycle/mobius-civic-ai-terminal): operator terminal and agent gateway
- [Civic-Protocol-Core](https://github.com/kaizencycle/Civic-Protocol-Core): identity, MIC wallet, ledger backend
- [mobius-hive](https://github.com/kaizencycle/mobius-hive): HIVE civilization-shell world-state

## Writing

- [The Kaizen Cycle](https://kaizencycle.substack.com/): essays on integrity economics, systems thinking, and civic design

## Optional

- [Site chambers](https://mobius-substrate.com/hallway): Learn (OAA), Memory (EPICON Ledger), Pulse (Civic Terminal), World (HIVE), Council (DVA), Archives (Reserve Blocks), Core (Civic Protocol)

quoted, indexed, and reused.
